title: Nanning, Guangxi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nanning, Guangxi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nanning is a city in Guangxi with a population of 8,741,000. Capital of Guangxi region, a subtropical city known for its green spaces, Zhuang minority culture, and role as ASEAN trade gateway.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
